'''竏單-sh-m-p''' ('''kadashmepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:foof|foof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foof|foof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單-sh-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadashmepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidashmepoko|thidashmepoko]] || [[word:jidashmepoko|jidashmepoko]] || [[word:shidashmepoko|shidashmepoko]] || [[word:kidashmepoko|kidashmepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudashmepoko|thuthudashmepoko]] || [[word:jujudashmepoko|jujudashmepoko]] || [[word:shushudashmepoko|shushudashmepoko]] || [[word:kukudashmepoko|kukudashmepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudashmepoko|thudashmepoko]] || [[word:judashmepoko|judashmepoko]] || [[word:shudashmepoko|shudashmepoko]] || [[word:kudashmepoko|kudashmepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudashmepoko|thudashmepoko]] || [[word:judashmepoko|judashmepoko]] || [[word:shudashmepoko|shudashmepoko]] || [[word:kudashmepoko|kudashmepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedashmepoko|thedashmepoko]] || [[word:jedashmepoko|jedashmepoko]] || [[word:shedashmepoko|shedashmepoko]] || [[word:kedashmepoko|kedashmepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodashmepoko|thothodashmepoko]] || [[word:jojodashmepoko|jojodashmepoko]] || [[word:shoshodashmepoko|shoshodashmepoko]] || [[word:kokodashmepoko|kokodashmepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodashmepoko|thodashmepoko]] || [[word:jodashmepoko|jodashmepoko]] || [[word:shodashmepoko|shodashmepoko]] || [[word:kodashmepoko|kodashmepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodashmepoko|thodashmepoko]] || [[word:jodashmepoko|jodashmepoko]] || [[word:shodashmepoko|shodashmepoko]] || [[word:kodashmepoko|kodashmepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdashmepoko|thﾃｦdashmepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦdashmepoko|jﾃｦdashmepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦdashmepoko|shﾃｦdashmepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦdashmepoko|kﾃｦdashmepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadashmepoko|thathadashmepoko]] || [[word:jajadashmepoko|jajadashmepoko]] || [[word:shashadashmepoko|shashadashmepoko]] || [[word:kakadashmepoko|kakadashmepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadashmepoko|thadashmepoko]] || [[word:jadashmepoko|jadashmepoko]] || [[word:shadashmepoko|shadashmepoko]] || [[word:kadashmepoko|kadashmepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadashmepoko|thadashmepoko]] || [[word:jadashmepoko|jadashmepoko]] || [[word:shadashmepoko|shadashmepoko]] || [[word:kadashmepoko|kadashmepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadashmepithi|shadashmepithi]] || [[word:shadashmepiji|shadashmepiji]] || [[word:shadashmepishi|shadashmepishi]] || [[word:shadashmepiki|shadashmepiki]]

|}
